summary: Interaction surface abstraction complete: core Zod types, emit_interaction MCP tool, parseConventionalMarkdown CLI utility, markdown conventions doc, and migration of all 5 core skills (brainstorming, planning, execution, verification, code-review) to use structured interactions and markdown conventions.
learnings: All 5 core skill files are hardlinked between claude-code and gemini-cli — editing one copy updates both automatically
Terminal/CLI references in code-review SKILL.md existed in the phase pipeline table and success criteria — both needed surface-agnostic renaming
